title: Divine Intervention
description: This mod adds angels to the game,and other cool stuff!!!.
body:
This is a really cool mod that adds angels to the game, you can trade them rubis to get multiple "good" quality items, and even other things that the mod adds.
Note that the mod is inspired by biblical themes, but it does not tries to replicate it 1:1,
it is purely for your enterteinement, have fun!
Also, try not to eat the ominous looking apple, if you find one...

Note that the current trading system is a bit buggy.

**Where do I find Them?**

-To Spawn an Angel, You need to craft a Divine Communicator and use a Divine token on it

**What the new trade items do?**

-Crucifix: gives a new fire effect to however hits you, its basically the same effect you get by hitting an angel.

-Halo: gives you absorption the less health you get.

-Unobtanium Upgrade: this one is self-explanatory, have fun crafting Unobtanium!.

etc...

**UPCOMING CONTENT**
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
 -More unique trade items (Maybe);
 -More cool craftable items;
 -Angel armor set;
</details>
